entries.reasoning: This repo is about Postgres tooling (pgpm workspaces) and has nothing to do with vercel-labs/just-bash. The name 'just-bash-test' appears to be a coincidental collision. README describes Postgres/Docker setup, not any just-bash integration.

While conceptually interesting (DSPy RLM integration using just-bash-py), the README is extremely sparse with no install command, no usage example, and explicitly marked as proof-of-concept. Insufficient evidence of real code or usable implementation to justify inclusion.

entries.description: Second MCP server wrapping just-bash with Laminar observability tracing, configurable timeouts, and VS Code MCP integration support
entries.reasoning: Clearly a just-bash MCP integration with real implementation details, install instructions, usage examples, and additional features (Laminar tracing, packaging). Similar to the existing just-bash-mcp entry but by a different author with distinct features.

The README is a near-verbatim copy of the canonical just-bash README (same security model, same installation instructions, same examples). Despite the Supabase SQL description, there's no unique content describing what this project actually adds. Fails the copy detection check.

A 4D-language port of just-bash which is an interesting concept, but the README has no install command, no usage examples, and the repo appears to be an empty stub (0 stars, created and pushed same day with no substantive content beyond a brief description). Insufficient evidence of real implementation.

context-fs is a broader platform for exposing APIs as virtual filesystems; just-bash is one adapter among several (NFS, CLI, Linear, etc.). Fails the is_just_bash_focused check — just-bash is not central to its identity.

This is a general AI SDK memory example that uses just-bash as one of three implementation approaches alongside structured-actions and observational patterns. Just-bash is not central to the project's identity — it's a supporting tool in a broader memory architecture demo.

A broad production AI stack (RAG, memory, streaming UI, document ingestion) that uses just-bash as one component among many. Just-bash is not central to this project's identity — it fails the is_just_bash_focused check.
This is a bug reproduction repo demonstrating a just-bash failure, not a library, integration, or project building on just-bash. It has no value as an awesome-list entry.
